title: Governing authorities
doc_html:
§1102.  Governing authorities

The governing authority of subdivisions enumerated in this Chapter shall be: for parishes, the police jury of the parish or its equivalent; for cities, towns and villages, the municipal boards thereof.
doc_text:
§1102.  Governing authorities
The governing authority of subdivisions enumerated in this Chapter shall be: for parishes, the police jury of the parish or its equivalent; for cities, towns and villages, the municipal boards thereof.
